---
title: "dySim"
description: "An R package for running Monte Carlo simulations to evaluate methods of dyadic data analysis."
image: thumb.png
categories: [R Package, Methods, Simulation, Dyadic Data]
date: 2024-01-01
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
![dySim hex logo](thumb.png){width="100%"}
:::

## Overview {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9}

The `dySim` package simplifies the process of running a variety of Monte Carlo simulations for the purpose of evaluating methods of dyadic data analysis. `dySim` builds on the [lavaan](https://lavaan.ugent.be/) and [dySEM](../dySEM/index.qmd) packages.

The package is under active development and is being brought into alignment with the current functionality of `dySEM`.

:::

## Intended Scope

`dySim` is designed to support simulations of:

- **Parameter estimation** -- bias, accuracy, and coverage
- **Statistical power** -- power analysis and sample size planning
- **Model evaluation** -- model evaluation and selection under various data-generating conditions

## Development Status

`dySim` is in an **experimental** lifecycle stage. The API and functionality are evolving rapidly. After a period of dormancy, active development has resumed, with the package being brought into alignment with `dySEM`'s growing feature set.

Would-be users should expect changes to the API in the near future. Reach out if you have questions about usage or suggestions for new features.

## Installation

Install the development version from GitHub:

```r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("jsakaluk/dySim")
```

## Links

- {{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jsakaluk/dySim)
- {{< fa book >}} [Package Documentation](https://jsakaluk.github.io/dySim/)

## Media

<!-- Add press releases, news coverage, blog posts, etc. as bullet points: -->
<!-- -  [Article Title](https://link-to-article.com) -->

*No media coverage yet. Add links here as they become available.*
